text: Jarvis, quick check-in. What's on the calendar today?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Tuesday, December 24. You have the CareConnect stakeholder review at 3 PM, and Ethan has piano with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick log: Anika and I were mapping out the sprint goals. Our Twilio integration is throwing 400 rate limit errors during signups. This could be a blocker for the Vertex Health launch.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. That sounds critical. We should implement a queue-based message broker to buffer SMS delivery rather than hitting Twilio directly. Would you like me to draft a summary for Greg?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just had a quick look at the CareConnect backlog. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has secure messaging. Greg is not going to like this, but we have to push back.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! That is a common bottleneck. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping secure messaging in the MVP. We should review this with Greg tomorrow morning.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. He is studying hard for the school spelling bee tomorrow. He is growing up so fast.
title: Kids School Update

text: Understood. School projects are fun. Spelling bees build great vocabulary. I can quiz him on the word list if he wants. I can quiz him whenever he is ready.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Calculating some savings estimates. Researching the tax benefits of the Texas 529 plan. Need to make a final decision soon.
title: Finance Update

text: Logged that. I've compiled the spreadsheet numbers. 529 plans offer great tax-free growth. I've archived the plan details. I'll update the budget sheet.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick log: Took Lily to her medical checkup. I hit 18 miles of running this week. Health has to be a priority.
title: Health Update

text: Sleep quality is so important. Great progress! The consistent stretching is keeping you stable. The refilling reminder is active.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick log: Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Good planning. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. We have a conflict about whether to prioritize security or speed for the launch. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. I can help with that. Security must come first for patient data. We can cite HIPAA standards to Greg to resolve the dispute. Let's verify this in the staging environment first.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Anika and I were mapping out the sprint goals. We are hitting major bottleneck issues with /sms/send under load. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. Got it, Mike. We should implement a connection pool or check the indexing on the underlying tables for /sms/send. Should we schedule a calendar slot to do a deep dive?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. We need to sign his permission slip for the field trip to the science museum. He is growing up so fast.
title: Kids School Update

text: He is doing so well. I've added the deadline and details to the calendar so we don't forget. His curiosity is really impressive.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Updating our financial spreadsheets. Sarah and I are looking to maximize our savings rate. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: Understood. I can run some projections for you. Smart move. I've summarized recent expenses so you can find cuts. Ready to calculate more rates.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Managing some allergy issues today. The pediatrician says Lily is growing on track. Need to focus on recovery.
title: Health Update

text: Got it, Mike. Great consistency with running. Excellent news. The pediatric report is saved in Lily's folder. I'll monitor the sleep metrics tonight.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Jarvis, Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Screen time is always a negotiation. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. Busy day at Vertex Health. Logged my running mileage and stretched my knee. Dealt with bedtime tantrums but made it through. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
